reasoning: The HIPAA control 164.312(b) requires audit controls, which directly map to Kubernetes audit logging capabilities. Kubernetes provides audit logging to track API requests and responses, which aligns with the requirement for audit controls. The functions ensure that audit logging is enabled, logs are retained for a specific duration, and the audit policy is configured to capture necessary metadata.
title: 164_312_b: 164.312(b) Audit controls
